title: Morita-san is Taciturn
overview: Mayu Morita has trouble making friends due to her ever silent nature.

title: Miki Is a Chatterbox
overview: Mayu puts up with the chatty conversation of her best friend, Miki Murakoshi.

title: Hana Is Shy
overview: The shy Hana Matsuzaka gets to talk with Mayu after she spots something in her hair.

title: Summer Is Naturally Hot
overview: Mayu and her friends try to beat off the summer heat.

title: High School Girls Like Sweet Things
overview: Mayu and friends go to an ice cream shop, where they discover a delicious looking parfait.

title: The Delusions Don`t Stop
overview: A pair of boys, along with a girl with glasses, make delusional observations of Mayu and friends

title: There Are Many Ideal Types
overview: The girls talk about what their ideal partner would be like whilst Miki's ideal crush gets shot down.

title: Summer Festival in a Yukata
overview: Mayu and friends go to a summer festival together.

title: The Pool Is Full of Charm
overview: The girls have swimming classes.

title: Yamamoto Is Cool
overview: Morita encounters the popular Ritsuki Yamamoto, who ends up saying weird things when under pressure.

title: Being Alone Sometimes is Fine
overview: After a test, Mayu goes by herself to a cake shop.

title: A Passionate Couple
overview: Mayu worries about the relationship between her parents.

title: Everybody's Day Off
overview: Mayu and her friends go shopping where they try to find matching items.

title: Ms. Maki is in Charge
overview: Maki-Sensei catches "cute moments" from some of her students.

title: Baking is a Fierce Battle
overview: Hana-chan schools her class mates in proper baking etiquette.

title: Autumn is the Season for Reading
Sleepovers are Fun
overview: The girls decide to have a slumber party at the Morita house, and Mayu wants to girl talk about romance.

title: Autumn is the Season of Love?
overview: Unable to contain his passion any longer, one of Ritsuki's juniors musters up his courage and confesses his love. Unfortunately, when he opens his eyes, it's Mayu that's standing there.

title: Ms. Hama is Anxious
overview: Student teacher Hama-sensei is taking over Mayu's class, and Mayu's blank stare has the new teacher worried about her.

title: Cultural Festivals Require Important Preparations
overview: Class 2-3 decides to hold a flea market for the school Culture Festival. The four girls...

title: Staying Home with a Cold
overview: Mayu's got plans to hang out with her friends, but she's stuck at home sick in bed.

title: It is Amiable to be Careless
overview: Mayu and the girls get worried when Miki doesn't show up for school, and it only gets worse when they find out she's been in a traffic accident.

title: Everyone gets Part Time Jobs at Christmas
overview: It's Christmastime and Chihiro wants some extra cash, so she tries to get the girls to take part-time jobs at the local bakery.

title: Those Four are Pretty Close
overview: When Miki and Chihiro get in a huge fight, Mayu tries to help patch things up.
